name: sdd-evolution
description: Gives Enterprise SDD the ability to evolve itself by analysing external frameworks, comparing approaches, harvesting features, planning improvements, and designing new modules and extensions
author: Enterprise SDD

agents.name: Agent Builder
agents.description: Creates new AI agents or improves existing ones through interactive consultation. Enforces SDD conventions: constitution reference, phase assignment, boundaries (Always Do / Ask First / Never Do), shared instructions, templates, send: false on all handoffs. Meta-layer agent for extending the framework itself.

agents.name: Evolution Planner
agents.description: Converts proposed improvements from _evolution/EVOLUTION.md into detailed, actionable implementation plans with phased tasks, stored in _plan/. Mandatory T/V/Z closure phases are always included.

agents.name: Extension Designer
agents.description: Interactive agent that helps design and scaffold new SDD extensions. Extensions are lighter-weight single-purpose additions (one agent + optional instruction/prompt) compared to full modules.

agents.name: Framework Analyst
agents.description: Reads an entire AI agent framework directory and produces a comprehensive structured ANALYSIS.md document following the standard template. Does NOT update repos (use framework-updater) or produce comparison documents (use framework-comparator).

agents.name: Framework Comparator
agents.description: Compares multiple AI agent frameworks from their ANALYSIS.md files and produces a structured COMPARISON.md with master table, thematic deep-dives, and cross-framework synthesis. Does NOT update repos or produce individual analyses.

agents.name: Framework Updater
agents.description: Pulls latest versions of tracked public framework repositories, detects changes since the last refresh, and updates WHATSNEW.md. For major changes, delegates to framework-analyst and framework-comparator. Does NOT produce comparison documents from scratch.

agents.name: Guidance Builder
agents.description: Creates structured guidance files (.guidance.md) through interactive consultation. Guidance documents explain best practices, patterns, trade-offs, and recommendations with concrete examples. Meta-layer companion to Agent Builder and Instruction Builder.

agents.name: Instruction Builder
agents.description: Creates structured instruction files (.instructions.md) through interactive consultation. Standardizes patterns, best practices, and coding rules that apply to specific file types via glob patterns. Meta-layer companion to Agent Builder.

agents.name: Module Designer
agents.description: Interactive agent that helps design and scaffold new SDD modules. Guides the user through requirements gathering, then generates module.json, agents, instructions, prompts, templates, and scaffolds following the module system conventions.

agents.name: Prompt Builder
agents.description: Creates custom SDD prompt files (.prompt.md) through interactive consultation. Composes agent chains, selects phases, and generates reusable prompt templates for specific project patterns. Meta-layer companion to Agent Builder.

agents.name: SDD Evolver
agents.description: Analyses public framework updates and proposes improvements for Enterprise SDD by appending a new harvest section to _evolution/EVOLUTION.md — respecting SDD philosophy, design boundaries, and gate integrity.

agents.name: Workflow Builder
agents.description: Creates and maintains GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow files (.yml) for the .github/workflows/ directory. Designs automated pipelines that enforce SDD quality gates, run consistency checks, and validate specification artifacts on pull requests and pushes. Meta-layer agent for CI/CD automation.
